logline: A prompt engineer curates the remnants of his vanishing craft in a sparse apartment that has become a personal museum of human-AI communication.
scene: a man sitting in a sparse modern apartment surrounded by old monitors and printed documents pinned to walls, cool blue-gray light from a cloudy window, the screens showing archived conversations and prompt templates, the space feels like a personal museum, minimal furniture, a sense of quiet preservation
keyProps: Cool blue-gray light from a cloudy window
camera: Wide workspace framing, 35mm lens, low-key lighting, melancholic atmosphere
lighting: Cool blue-gray ambient from a cloudy window with occasional warm practical light from monitors
productionDesign: Cool desaturated palette, 35mm film look, post-industrial sparse apartment, visible age and wear on technology, mid-future 2032-2034 setting
signatureTwist: close-up of a framed document on a white wall, the document dense with carefully formatted prompt engineering notation, cool diffused light falling across the glass surface, the frame slightly dusty, a small desk lamp casting warm light on just the bottom edge of the frame, the rest of the room in shadow
